- Concrete Quality: Precast Concrete f'c 60 MPa, max aggregate size 20mm, slump 80mm
- Curing: 14 days continuously wet

Details concrete quality and curing requirements, aligning with the Concretework design criteria.
ITEM: Loads (PAGE 2)
- Vertical Live Loads: 5 kPa
- Wind Loads: Ultimate Limit State 48 m/s, Serviceability Limit State 39 m/s
- Wave Loads: Hmax 2.3m, Period T 10 seconds
- Mooring Loads: Design Vessel P.V. Houtman, Length 22m, Beam 6.2m, Draft 1.8m, Freeboard 1.6m, Displacement 50 tonnes
- Berthing Loads: Velocity 0.3 m/s, Abnormal Berthing Factor 2.0, Energy 4.98 kNm
- Corrosion Allowance: 2.0 mm for all steelwork

- Steel Grade: Grade 350 to AS 1594, AS 3678, AS 3679

- Concrete Strength: Precast Concrete f'c 60 MPa
- Structural Steel Strength: Tubular Steel fsy 350 MPa, Piles fsy 350 MPa

- System: Standard bolted Monowills galvanized tubular handrail
- Spacing: Maximum stanchion spacing 1.5m

- Steelwork: Class 2.5 blast, Interzone 954, 700 micron DFT minimum
- Sacrificial Anode: Aluminum Alloy A1, A2, A6, design life 12.5 years

- Concrete Quality: Precast Concrete f'c 60 MPa, max aggregate size 20mm, slump 80mm

- Vertical Live Loads: 5 kPa
- Wind Loads: Ultimate Limit State 48 m/s, Serviceability Limit State 39 m/s

- Mooring Loads: Design Vessel P.V. Houtman, Length 22m, Beam 6.2m, Draft 1.8m, Freeboard 1.6m, Displacement 50 tonnes
- Berthing Loads: Velocity 0.3 m/s, Abnormal Berthing Factor 2.0, Energy 4.98 kNm
- Corrosion Allowance: 2.0 mm for all steelwork

ITEM: Precast Panel (PAGE 3)
- Precast Panel Type 1: 12000mm length
- Fender Spacings: 2000mm centers

ITEM: Typical Section Thru Approach Jetty (PAGE 4)
- Steel Crosshead: Refer to DRG No. 60290364-MA-DRG-0008
- Steel Piles: Approximate seabed level varies

ITEM: Alternative Precast Deck Unit Details (PAGE 5)
- Macalloy Bars: Tensioned to 354 kN
- Grout: 50 MPa non-shrink grout

METADATA:
- Project: Abrolhos Island Jetties - Option 1
- Date: 24 March 2015
- Engineer/Designer: JJM
- Drawing Number: Various (e.g., 60290364-MA-DRG-0001, 60290364-MA-DRG-0002)
- Revision: Issued for Construction
- Standards: AS/NZS 4671, AS 3600, AS 4100, AS/NZS 1554, AS 1594, AS 3678, AS 3679, AS 1252, ISO 3506, AS 2239, AS 2700
